sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime DEFAULT toDateTimeOrDefault('2022-12-30 13:44:17'));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = toDateTimeOrDefault('2023-01-01 10:00:00') WHERE event_time < toDateTimeOrDefault('2023-01-01');
SELECT event_time, toDateTimeOrDefault('', 'UTC', '2023-01-01 00:00:00') AS default_time FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT toDateTimeOrDefault('2022-12-30 20:00:00') AS valid_time, toDateTimeOrDefault('invalid', 'UTC', '2023-01-01 00:00:00') AS fallback_time;
